results.author: @DeadRedCloud (Chris Peck)
results.content: Who cancelled the deal with Iran not to develop nukes? Trump.

results.author: @John34760076823 (John)
results.content: Again, Iranians only hope for survival is that the US doesn't want an all out war scenario... Trump is allowing them make a deal. If you really think the US can't invade Iran then you are not coherent... will there be a lot of US casualties yes.. but in the end Iran will lose.

results.author: @Intellectanchor (IntellectAnchor)
results.content: Sir Mr. TRUMP will Accept his defeat and make a deal before leaving the middle East or if he runs before accepting the whole middle East will be controlled or dominated by Iran for the next 10-15 years.

results.author: @BullTheoryio (Bull Theory) [VERIFIED]
results.content: BREAKING: Trump threatens to destroy Iran's bridges and power plants if no deal is reached and Hormuz is not reopened. Says open the Strait or 'you'll be living in hell.'

results.author: @TrueNorthLarry (Larry of the North)
results.content: The US had a nuclear deal with Iran. Inspectors were watching, and ensuring no weapons grade uranium and then Trump scrapped it. Iran wasn't a threat to the US at all.

results.author: @FlowPredict_io (FlowPredict) [VERIFIED]
results.content: Trump drops Easter Sunday f-bomb in new threat to Iran. Prediction markets: US-Iran ceasefire by April 30: 18¢; May 31: 34¢; June 30: 47¢; Dec 31: 70¢

results.author: @dawsonjohn95 (John Dawson)
results.content: Remember when Trump restarted a WAR he initially ended by negotiating a ceasefire? Then the WAR forced the insurers to end coverage on ships going thru the Strait? Now he's blaming the nation he struck for something that his WAR caused.

results.author: @MarioNawfal (Mario Nawfal) [VERIFIED]
results.content: "Tuesday will be Power Plant Day, and Bridge Day all wrapped in one" I really hope he doesn't mean that, and I really hope Iran accepts a ceasefire, for the sake of their people. This entire war was a mistake, and if Trump delivers on his threats, it could become a catastrophe.

results.author: @Khoza0124 (Ghost)
results.content: Trump after Iran denies another ceasefire before Tuesday.

results.author: @KobeissiLetter (The Kobeissi Letter) [VERIFIED]
results.content: BREAKING: President Trump announces he will be having a news conference with the US Military at 1 PM ET tomorrow. This is just 3 hours after his '48 hour warning' to Iran expires. He also just declared Tuesday as 'power plant and bridge day.' We will be covering it real-time.

results.author: @WatcherGuru (Watcher.Guru) [VERIFIED]
results.content: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at buying more Bitcoin. '₿ack to Work.'
